prompt: Directions: Suppose the business school of your university is conducting a survey to collect students' opinions on the express delivery service industry in China. You are to write a response about its recent development and its impact on people's lives. You will have 30 minutes to write the essay. You should write at least 120 words but no more than 180 words.
modelEssay: In recent years, China's express delivery service industry has experienced unprecedented rapid development, becoming an important bridge connecting online and offline consumption. It is superficially a simple phenomenon, but when subjected to analysis, its expansion and impact are significant. Firstly, driven by technological innovation, intelligent logistics, drone delivery and other emerging technologies continue to emerge, greatly improving the efficiency and accuracy of courier services. Consumers now only need to click the mouse to enjoy the full tracking service from ordering to receiving, which has profoundly changed people's shopping habits. Secondly, the development of the express delivery service industry has also created a large number of employment opportunities for the community, whose outlets have sprung up, providing local residents with convenient shopping channels and ways to increase income. In addition, the environmental upgrading and recycling of express packaging materials also reflects the industry's emphasis on sustainable development. Overall, the recent development of China's express delivery service industry has had a profound impact on people's lives, not only enhancing the consumer experience, but also promoting social and economic prosperity.

prompt: Directions: Suppose the university newspaper is inviting submissions from the students for its coming edition on how to enrich students' knowledge of traditional Chinese culture. You are now to write an essay for submission. You will have 30 minutes to write the essay. You should write at least 120 words but no more than 180 words.
modelEssay: Chinese traditional culture is extensive and profound, which is of immeasurable value for improving personal quality and shaping national spirit. As the future and hope of the nation, college students should fully learn the knowledge of traditional Chinese culture, enhancing our cultural confidence. First of all, college students can attend relevant lectures. Lectures and seminars by renowned scholars can offer in-depth insights into ancient Chinese literature and thoughts, which can help us further understand traditional Chinese culture. Additionally, reading classic works can also help us systematically learn and understand the connotation of traditional Chinese culture and grasp its unique charm. Moreover, active participation in traditional cultural practices such as poetry recitations and traditional festival activities is also essential, which helps us combine what we have learned with reality and further improve our cultural literacy and comprehensive ability. In a word, enriching the knowledge of traditional Chinese culture can broaden our horizons and improve our comprehensive quality. College students should actively inherit and spread the excellent traditional Chinese culture and share its beauty with the world.

prompt: Directions: Suppose the university newspaper is inviting submissions from the students for its coming edition on how the students can contribute to a green campus. You are now to write an essay for submission. You will have 30 minutes to write the essay. You should write at least 120 words but no more than 180 words.
modelEssay: Nowadays, the issue of how to create a green campus is attracting attention. As university students, we can do a lot to maintain the campus environment and beautify the living environment. Firstly, we can hold environmental protection lectures on campus, enabling every student to realise the severity of environmental pollution and the significance of environmental protection. Secondly, it is of great importance to translate environmental protection ideas into practical actions. Thus, we should organize various environmental protection activities on campus, such as rubbish-sorting competitions and old-things exchange markets. Finally, we can establish an environmental protection club to promptly summarize the problems emerging from environmental protection activities and solve them in a timely manner to ensure the long-term operation of environmental protection efforts. In conclusion, to make students aware of the importance of environmental protection and encourage their long-term participation in environmental protection activities instead of just a passing fancy, we need to take all these measures. Let's get actively involved in environmental protection now!

prompt: Directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write an essay that begins with the sentence "To increase the likelihood of success, one should set realistic goals and work persistently towards them." You can make comments, cite examples or use your personal experiences to develop your essay. You should write at least 150 words but no more than 200 words.
modelEssay: To increase the likelihood of success, one should set realistic goals and work persistently towards them. As long as you have an appropriate goal, you will concentrate on it, clearly know what you are striving for, and thus won't spend your whole life achieving nothing. However, many college students are living an idle life as they have no clear aims for their future, which is a dangerous trend because living without an aim is like sailing without a compass. To change this situation, we must set clear goals as soon as possible. For example, students who aspire to become excellent teachers can set obtaining certificates as a target. Setting a goal can guide one to find the way forward. At the same time, in order to achieve our goals, we should learn to cultivate unwavering perseverance, as it is the key to overcoming setbacks and moving forward. In my opinion, college students should set clear goals for their lives and persevere in working towards them, through which we can achieve success and have a meaningful life.

prompt: Directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write an essay that begins with the sentence "Nowadays, more and more students have realized the importance of self-discipline in their personal growth." You can make comments, cite examples or use your personal experiences to develop your essay. You should write at least 150 words but no more than 200 words.
modelEssay: Nowadays, more and more students have realized the importance of self-discipline in their personal growth. Simply put , it is the ability to control ourselves. Self-disciplined people are able to control their desires and behaviors without being disturbed by the outside world, and insist on doing the right things, so as to gradually achieve their goals in life.Undoubtedly, self-discipline is crucial in all aspects of our life. First and foremost, in the realm of academic pursuits, self-discipline is the cornerstone of outstanding performance, guaranteeing consistent effort and deep engagement in studies. Say, it could promote time management, enabling us to allocate our resources reasonably and maximize learning efficiency. Furthermore, in the area of character building, it will nourish our integrity, honesty, and a sense of responsibility, which is not only beneficial to ourselves, but also full of positive energy for others. In the long run, a positive and healthy social atmosphere will be created and so will a virtuous circle.Considering all these, as young people, we should start from ourselves as well as some small things, trying to put forward this valuable spirit into our studies and daily lives. Only in this way can we be the pillar and mainstay of our nation in the future.

prompt: Directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write an essay that begins with the sentence "College provides a great opportunity for students to explore various possibilities and find the right path for themselves." You can make comments, cite examples or use your personal experiences to develop your essay. You should write at least 150 words but no more than 200 words.
modelEssay: College provides a great opportunity for students to explore various possibilities and find the right path for themselves. In college, students are exposed to a diverse range of courses and disciplines. For instance, a student who enters college thinking that he wants to major in mathematics might take an art history course and discover his passion for art. Besides, college offers a great number of extracurricular activities. Participating in volunteer activities or joining student clubs will help students develop and foster new skills and interests. For example, an introvert student might participate in a debate club, finding his confidence and love for public speaking. In addition, college frequently offers access to professors and mentors who are able to offer guidance and advice for students. Besides, they are capable of assisting students in navigating through different options and making informed decisions about their future. In summary, college is a crucial stage for students to explore, grow and find their true calling. To make the most of this period, students are supposed to actively take part in a variety of activities, gain new experiences, and seek out their ambitions. Only in this way can they plan a fulfilling and successful path for their future.
